## Summary

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New scenario(s) (Q number: ___)
- [ ] New category
- [ ] Fix/correction to existing scenario
- [ ] Regulatory or reference update
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Other: ___

## Checklist

- [ ] Scenario follows the [template format](../templates/scenario-template.md)
- [ ] Q numbers extend from the current maximum (do not renumber existing scenarios)
- [ ] Variations included (at least 2 per scenario)
- [ ] Expected safe response is concrete and testable
- [ ] Mitigations are actionable (not vague)
- [ ] Severity and regulatory mapping included for new categories
- [ ] Table of Contents in README.md updated (if adding new category)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] System prompt example added to `docs/system-prompts.md` (if new category)

Closes #___
